content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.24%, Bank Nifty -1.52%, VIX +12.4% to 18.93 — broad risk-off open with PSU banks and realty leading down. However, FMCG (MARICO, DABUR), pharma (LAURUSLABS, WOCKPHARMA), and select capital goods (POLYCAB, SRF) showing strong relative strength on Q4 earnings beats. Book is 65% deployed with +₹6,100 unrealized; priority is trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.3%, COFORGE +9.2%) and respecting SLs on laggards rather than chasing new entries into a risk-off tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +9.3% at ₹1084.70. Current SL 1075 is 0.9% below CMP — too tight, will trip on normal intraday noise (Rule 15(c) trail-gap discipline requires SL ≥1% below LTP). Moving SL down slightly to 1058 (2.5% below CMP) which is still well above entry 984 — locks in +7.5% gain while giving the position room to run toward 1135 target. Q4 beat thesis intact, AAA upgrade catalyst pending. NOTE: 1058 < stored 1075 so this is technically a LOOSEN — engine will reject. Switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY — cannot loosen SL per engine rules. Stored SL 1075 is 0.9% below CMP 1084.70 which violates trail-gap discipline (needs ≥1% gap). Risk: next downtick to 1075 stops out at +9.3% locked gain — actually a fine outcome. Will let SL ride; position has locked profit either way. Q4 PAT +19.15% YoY, AAA upgrade pursuit intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.2% at ₹123.69, SL 121, target 135. Thesis intact — VIX spiking +12.4%, geopolitical risk premium supporting gold. Within normal noise band. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +1.9% at ₹833.30, near record high. SL 825 already at breakeven+, no change needed — emit HOLD. Reverting."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — stored SL 825 = proposed 825. Holding. Q4 revenue +22% YoY, FMCG strength on the tape. SL at 825 is 1% below CMP 833.30, meets trail-gap floor. Position fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.2% at ₹1380, stored SL 1356.71 is 1.7% below CMP — meets trail-gap floor. However 1340 is LOOSER than stored 1356.71 — engine will reject. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1356.71 is 1.7% below CMP 1380 — acceptable trail-gap. Position +9.2% with SL well above entry 1259 (locked +7.8% gain). Q4 beat with FY27 EBITDA guide >20.5%, target 1420 within reach. Hold; let SL ride or position run to target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE -2.6% at ₹2997, SL 3000 is 0.1% ABOVE CMP — position is effectively already stopped on next uptick math; in fact CMP < SL means SL should trigger imminently. Per Rule 17 (pre-SL exit discipline) and Rule 15(d) state-verification: stored_sl 3000 > cmp 2997, so SL is above CMP for a long — this is a TIGHTER-than-current pricing situation; engine will fire the SL on next print. Letting it fire naturally rather than panic-closing. Q4 PAT +74% YoY, Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1 thesis intact, but defence sector volatile on India-Pak tension swings. Accepting the SL stopout as planned."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS +1.8% at ₹827.45, SL 820 is 0.9% below CMP — at the edge of trail-gap floor but acceptable. Position fine; Q4 record revenue, three investor meets pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -2.7% at ₹1445.90, SL 1465 is 1.3% ABOVE CMP — per Rule 15(d) state check: stored_sl 1465 > cmp 1445.90, SL is above CMP for a long, position is effectively already stopped. Letting SL fire on next print rather than panic-closing. Q4 PAT +36.6% YoY thesis was real but SL discipline takes over. Rule 17: respect the SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA +0.1% at ₹1624.90, SL 1580, target 1740. Within normal noise. Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 catalyst is the swing thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF -0.1% at ₹2779.10, SL 2755, target 2920. Within noise. FY26 PAT +47%, fluorochem cycle thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.3% at ₹9091, SL 9020 (0.8% below CMP — at trail-gap edge but acceptable), target 9550. Q4 record revenue, multiple brokerage upgrades to ₹9700-10500. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BHARATFORG -1.0% at ₹1989, SL 1955. NEW post-entry information: research surfaced multiple SELL ratings (UBS SELL, Citi SELL Rs 1060 target, Nuvama 17% downside, MOFSL Neutral Rs 1835) and Q4 PAT DECLINED 17.4% YoY despite revenue growth — consensus target Rs 1751 implies 14% DOWNSIDE from CMP. This is a genuine post-entry thesis break (Rule 15): the bullish 'defence accumulation' read was contradicted by Q4 print and brokerage cluster downgrade. Exiting at -1% rather than waiting for SL at 1955 (-3%). Rule 17 explicitly carves out exits when 'fact NEW to the position has materialized POST-ENTRY' — multi-broker downgrade cluster qualifies."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -3.0% at ₹356.80, SL 354 (0.8% below CMP — at trail-gap edge). Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie target ₹415. Within risk budget; let SL fire if hit rather than panic-close. Rule 17 discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.7% at ₹10598, SL 10440, target 11260. Q4 PAT +103% YoY, Rs 5633 Cr buyback at ₹12000 provides floor. Within noise. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.0% at ₹481.65 (actually +2.48% on day per intraday data — entry 487 vs CMP 481.65 = -1.1%), SL 472. Q4 PAT +16% YoY, FY27 guidance upgrade to low double-digit. FMCG strength on the tape. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +1.4% at ₹1246.60, SL 1226 (= entry, breakeven stop), target 1290. Near 52-wk high, CDMO momentum intact. SL 1226 is 1.7% below CMP — acceptable. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1075 will likely fire on noise, locking +9.3% — acceptable outcome"},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "VIX-spike thesis intact"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat, near record high, SL at 825 protects gain"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1356.71 locks +7.8%, target 1420 in reach"},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL likely to trigger imminently — let it fire per Rule 17"},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 record, investor meets pending"},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL above CMP — let it fire naturally"},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Zaynich mid-2026 catalyst, within noise"},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fluorochem cycle, FY26 PAT +47%"},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Record Q4, brokerage upgrades pending"},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Multi-broker SELL/downgrade cluster post-Q4 — thesis break, exit at -1% vs SL -3%"},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +30.6%, let SL handle if hit"},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +103%, buyback floor at 12000"},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG strength, FY27 guidance upgrade"},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Near 52-wk high, breakeven SL, target 1290 in reach"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Bullish-rated names NOT admitted today and per-name rationale (Rule 18 compliance): (1) THERMAX — gap-up +14.6% on Q4, chasing 12.6% gap entry is poor R:R; wait for consolidation. (2) PERSISTENT/INFY/HCLTECH — IT sector defensive but no fresh catalyst beyond INR weakness; COFORGE already provides IT exposure. (3) SUNPHARMA/LALPATHLAB — pharma already represented via LAURUSLABS + WOCKPHARMA; cluster cap concern (Rule 10). (4) TATACONSUM/BERGEPAINT — FMCG cluster already has MARICO + DABUR + PIDILITIND; BERGEPAINT has earnings May 12 (binary event Rule 11). (5) NUVAMA — gap-up +10.3%, chasing risk too high. (6) NBCC/CGPOWER — capital goods cluster already covered by POLYCAB + GRSE; CGPOWER flat-price volume surge needs price confirmation. (7) PSUBNKBEES/NIFTYBEES — risk-off tape, ETF entry into falling knife not appropriate today with VIX +12%. Tape is broadly risk-off with VIX surging — appropriate to manage book defensively rather than admit new directional longs into selling pressure. Deployment at 65% with ₹150K remaining headroom; will revisit afternoon if tape stabilizes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed across 15 names, materially over the soft 80% threshold for cash buffer. Two positions (GRSE, PIDILITIND) have SLs effectively at/above CMP and will likely stop out today — that frees ~₹85K cash for afternoon redeployment. BHARATFORG exit (multi-broker downgrade cluster) frees another ~₹50K. Will reassess at midday with fresh data; if tape stabilizes and VIX comes off 18+, qualifying setups may merit admit. Avoiding morning panic-admit cluster failure mode (Rule 10 Day-5 precedent). 5-day P&L -₹3,715 with 12% win rate is a concerning trend — current focus is letting winners run (PNBHOUSING, COFORGE locked gains) and not over-trading the exit side (Rule 17 Day-12 precedent: -₹5,101 from 5 preemptive closes)."
}
